goal: Self-host verification: install cnogo into its own repo, validate everything works end-to-end

tasks.name: Clean up old scripts/ directory and drop stale stash
microSteps: Verify all scripts/ files have been moved to .cnogo/ (Plans 01-02 must be complete)
git rm -r scripts/ to remove the old directory
Drop stash@{0} (stale partial implementation from previous attempt)
Verify scripts/ no longer exists in working tree
Verify no remaining references to 'scripts/' without '.cnogo/' prefix in .claude/ or CLAUDE.md

tdd.reason: Cleanup task — verified by directory absence and grep checks

tasks.action: Remove the now-empty scripts/ directory via git rm -r. Drop stash@{0} which contains stale partial work from the previous implementation attempt. Verify no orphaned references to old paths remain.

tasks.name: Run install.sh self-hosting verification
microSteps: Verify .cnogo/manifest.json was generated with correct file count
Verify .cnogo/version.json was generated with version and commit info
Verify .claude/settings.json has _cnogo markers on hook entries
Verify memory engine initializes: python3 .cnogo/scripts/workflow_memory.py prime --limit 1
Run uninstall dry-check: verify manifest lists all expected files
Run full test suite: python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q

tdd.reason: Integration verification — verified by running install.sh and checking artifacts

tasks.action: Run ./install.sh -y -m . to self-host cnogo into its own repo. Verify generated manifest.json has correct file count and categories. Verify version.json has version info. Verify .gitignore block markers. Verify settings.json _cnogo markers. Run memory engine and full test suite to confirm nothing broke.

tasks.name: Final validation pass and update documentation
microSteps: Update root CLAUDE.md Quick Start section to use .cnogo/scripts/ paths
Update root CLAUDE.md Structure section to reflect .cnogo/ layout
Verify all commands work: grep for any broken path references

tdd.reason: Documentation update — verified by validation and reference checks

tasks.action: Update both CLAUDE.md files to reference .cnogo/scripts/ paths instead of scripts/. Run full workflow validation and checks to confirm the entire system works end-to-end with the new layout. This is the final task — after this, cnogo packaging is complete.

commitMessage: feat(cnogo-packaging): self-host verification, cleanup, and documentation update
